title: Plan view explorer-only + fullscreen fixes (dbg94)
description:
Plan view now shows only the file explorer until you right-click a file. No inline raster workspace on load. PDF and raster files open in a full-screen overlay via Open in Plan/PDF Viewer or Map Builder. Fixes blank PDF viewer (mount no longer requires raster host). Close workspace returns to explorer-only.

Who is affected: OVH private server (PipeSync Plan view). SaaS unchanged until platform release applied in cPanel.
changeLog: Explorer fills the panel on load — no raster workspace until you open a file.
Fix PDF viewer blank screen in fullscreen (mount when only PDF host exists).
Post-layout remount for continuous PDF viewer after open.
Raster files: right-click → Plan Viewer or Map Builder (same as PDF).
Left-click on raster and PDF rows no longer opens workspace.
Menu: Close workspace. Cache bust dbg94.
